utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, items present: health_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Property_coverage is missing. Now check completeness: health_coverage includes type (health) and costs (monthly_cost), so it fits 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—mental health noted. Travel_coverage includes costs and coverage details—fits. Additional_services includes items with costs—fits. Total_budget includes monthly/annual and extras—fits. Property_coverage is not included at all.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes two identifiable items that match entries in the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (as the health_coverage provider) and Adventure Travel Coverage (as the travel_coverage provider). Additional services listed are optional descriptors without exact matching items in the ratings dataset (e.g., 'telemedicine' is phrased as an option but does not clearly map to the 'Telemedicine Services' item due to naming and pricing mismatch). Therefore, only the explicitly named matching items are mapped.
